allow: Bash(sed -i 's/interface CommandDialogProps extends DialogProps {}/type CommandDialogProps = DialogProps;/' src/components/ui/command.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/export interface TextareaProps extends React.TextareaHTMLAttributes<HTMLTextAreaElement> {}/export type TextareaProps = React.TextareaHTMLAttributes<HTMLTextAreaElement>;/' src/components/ui/textarea.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/^import type { Config } from "tailwindcss";/import type { Config } from "tailwindcss";\\nimport tailwindcssAnimate from "tailwindcss-animate";/' tailwind.config.ts)
